reviews.review_title: Good fun once you're used to VR Darts!
reviews.review_description:
Darts in VR takes a little bit of learning to get good and consistent groupings - sometimes releasing the darts at a awkward angle makes them fly in crazy directions, but quick jabs and releasing mid throw yields good results! 501 game mode is my favourite, zombie waves are crazy fun with dual wielding darts, but you've got to be quick and accurate!
I'd love to see some optional longer distance throwing for 501, the doubles at end are sometimes a real test for the groupings. 
Good fun game without breaking a window or getting a dart stuck in someone's back 😂 Thanks to MQ Promos and Giveaways FB Page and the Dev for the key, and look forward to climbing the leaderboards in future throwing matches!

Dart VR2:Bullseye isn’t just a game. It’s a masterclass in immersive physics. Every mode is engineered to perfection, with real-world ballistics that make each throw feel weighty, precise, and deeply satisfying.

I tried to put the headset down. Couldn’t. The engagement is magnetic. Hours fly by because the gameplay loop is that refined.

Fair warning: your arms will know you played. After a session, I realized I’d gotten a better workout than my last gym visit. Dart VR2 doesn’t just entertain — it exercises.

*Verdict: 10/10* — A benchmark for VR sports.

This has very good presentation.
The gfx are good… sound maybe could be a bit better.

I have played 2 other darts games, this one is up there with them… this is maybe more fun, more atmosphere and more arcadey than one of the other dart games, which that other seemed to be more realistic.

But this has 6 modes.. some are single player and some are multiplayer. Has scoreboards on some of the modes too, so you can see where you stand against other players from around the world. I think the league in multi will be fun and competitive.

I’d like if the hands wasn’t so thick, as they look like Mickey Mouse hands.. and maybe if I could turn using the stick.

I like the touch of walking down the aisle surrounded by a cheering crowd (would be good to be able to turn using the control and wave)… can re enact your fave darts players entries lol

I enjoyed playing the 501 mode, with the cheering (or booing) crowd behind me, which added to the atmosphere. Also a tv screen to the side that shows close up of your darts.

Maybe more dart designs would be good.. and more customisation options for your player.. but I guess they will come down the line.

There’s also a zombie horde mode too… stop the ongoing zombies with your darts! 

But yeah, I’d recommend this game if you like darts.

I'm not a huge fan of darts in 'real life', but I've fancied giving it a go in VR and have tried several versions of the game in the past.  This one however, might just be the one for me.  It's darts - yes,  but with a heavy arcade tint.  I'm not sure how long the included Zombies game will keep me entertained because in all honesty - I found just the regular version of darts entertaining enough.  When I managed to 'finally' hit the Bullseye, an animation that I found far more terrifying than the Zombies pops up.  Possibly because I wasn't expecting it?  
The game comes with some other Darts variants and several modes that are still locked at the moment (Party Mode and a league table I believe) but I'm looking forward to checking them out.  I'm off to get in some desperately needed practice!

Darts VR2: Bullseye is a very solid and fun VR darts experience. The physics feel great, and the variety of game modes keeps things fresh. A perfect mix of realism and arcade fun, whether playing solo or online.

reviews.review_title: Virtual Darts has never been this good!
reviews.review_description: The best way to play darts with friends near-and-far! Great graphics, variety of gameplay modes and online multiplayer. Love every minute of this game.
Another sports game brought to life in VR! Highly recommend whether you're a darts fan or just someone who occasionally plays down the pub. Amazing!
Now I can play darts with my friends and slayy the zombies. The music is great and around the world is surreal
Playing darts has never been more fun. Love the graphics!

This game is truly worth playing in VR. The experience feels incredibly immersive, almost like being inside a real-time live world rather than just playing a game. The game room environment adds a realistic touch that makes every moment more engaging and enjoyable. The visuals, atmosphere, and interaction together create a next-level VR experience. Overall,it’s one of those games that genuinely makes VR feel alive and unforgettable.

reviews.review_title: fun once you get the hang of it
reviews.review_description:
feedback: 

add ambidextrous mode or just get rid of picking left/right alltogether and have it whatever hand you hold up and press trigger on so I can switch mid match

scale back the particle effects on round the world mode and remove the moving walls and floor, not needed

zombie mode is pretty hard, even with consistent head shots. Will keep at it
Paid for it then going to play it i see no cricket,301,dido games. Can i get a refund?

This is darts and has Zombies whats not to love... From the moment you step in, the atmosphere is spot on — crisp visuals, realistic board physics, and that satisfying thud when your dart hits exactly where you aimed or not in my case lol!!

The controls are intuitive and responsive, whether you're going for a casual throw or chasing that perfect 180 and I feel I will be chasing a long time, it feels both natural and rewarding.

The game modes keep things fresh, and there’s a great balance between solo play and competitive challenges. 

If you enjoy darts or just want a fun, relaxing VR experience with a competitive edge, this is an easy recommendation. Smooth, immersive, and seriously addictive.

reviews.review_title: THE BEST DARTS GAME ON THE QUEST
reviews.review_description:
Literally came out an hour ago & I couldn’t wait to jump in, Absolutely blown away with the graphics & presentation of this game, I have played two other darts games, this one is undoubtedly the best of the 3.
The arena you play in is so alive with a crowd, cheering when you hit the board & boos when you miss, that crowd is brutal, I’m just a beginner.
Honestly the graphics are just amazing, so many different modes of play including zombie mode, which is fun but the real fun will definitely be in multiplayer, get a friend in here and have a great time on the ockey.
Just simply brilliant, well done Evolution Publishing.
It is a familiar game and makes it feel genuinely exciting in virtual reality. It leans into realism with fine tuned dart physics while also giving players a wide set of modes.
So I've tried this game today and I love it. Its a great experience, has seriousness of darts in 501 and fun in arcade modes. Walking darts mode is just great.
Very nice game. Love the graphics and the gameplay.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the positive feedback!
